text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... The Kikuka Sho... However I look at it, it
feels a little out of my reach... But I guess we did
get through the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hello, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Suzuka?! What are you doing at the Tokyo
Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you know... Anyway, what about you? I don't
mean to pry, but you seem a bit down.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well, I was just thinking about the Kikuka
Sho. I'm worried about whether I'll be able to run
such a long distance.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I guess we're both here to try and
shake off our anxiety...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's so quiet... It's hard to believe all of the
passion we experienced at the Derby happened
here...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I came here for the quiet. It lets me see things
I couldn't see before. My honest feelings, for
example.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Honest feelings?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
A thought came to me when we were running the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I considered not running in the Kikuka Sho,
because I'd found something more important to
me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What could be more important than the
Classics?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I want to see how far I can go with
medium-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I saw it during the third corner of the Derby—the
other side of speed. And I want to see if I can get
there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The other side... of speed?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is that a strange thing to say?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No way! If anything, it's really impressive! The
other side of speed—that sounds amazing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I don't really get it. But I'd love to
be able to say something cool like that someday!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I'll ever get to where you are,
though... I mean, I get scared just thinking about
how long the Kikuka Sho is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has given me so much, but I still can't
figure out what to do on my own...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh? But I think you're pretty amazing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
For all the support you receive, you always
manage to respond in kind. Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you think so? I guess I did manage to make it
all the way to the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I could never do something like that... I'm not sure
how to accept other people's emotions.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're much more amazing than you think. You
should have some more confidence in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll see you later. Good luck in the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I'm still not feeling confident. But I'll do my
best.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh! One last thing!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Um, I don't know how to put this, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm really, really, really happy that I got to run in the Derby with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka leaves with a smile on her face.
